heading: Infant and maternal mortality; fetal alcohol syndrome
label: 1680d Infant and maternal mortality; fetal alcohol syndrome
notes: Amendments1992—, struck out subsec. (a) designation before “By no later” and struck out subsec. (b) which read as follows: “The President shall include with the budget submitted under for each fiscal year a separate statement which specifies the total amount obligated or expended in the most recently completed fiscal year to achieve each of the objectives described in subsection (a) of this section.”Pub.
